P

PAGE_FOLDER - Static variable in interface in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ORSView
Base directory path pointing to structural view pages (.jsp).
password - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.UserBean
User password.
phoneNo - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.CollegeBean
Contact phone number of the college
physics - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.MarksheetBean
Stores physics marks
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.BaseCtl
Populates request data into bean object.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ChangePasswordCtl
Populates request data into UserBean object.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.CollegeCtl
Populates request data into CollegeBean.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.CollegeListCtl
Populates request data into CollegeBean.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.CourseCtl
Populates request data into CourseBean.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.CourseListCtl
Populates the CourseBean object with data retrieved from the request parameters submitted by the user.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.FacultyCtl
Populates the FacultyBean object with data extracted from the HTML form fields.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.FacultyListCtl
Populates the FacultyBean object with filtering parameters sent by the user from the list view search criteria.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ForgetPasswordCtl
Populates the UserBean object with the login credentials submitted by the user.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.GetMarksheetCtl
Populates the MarksheetBean object with the Roll Number parameter requested by the user.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.LoginCtl
Populates the UserBean data container object using raw input details taken from request elements.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.MarksheetCtl
Populates the MarksheetBean data transfer object using structural attributes extracted from user request parameters.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.MarksheetListCtl
Populates the MarksheetBean object with filtering parameters sent by the user from the list view search criteria fields.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.MyProfileCtl
Populates the UserBean context object data wrapper fields using matching input values retrieved from the request parameter map.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.RoleCtl
Populates the RoleBean data entity object container using structural request parameters.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.RoleListCtl
Populates the RoleBean data entity container with structural criteria parameters passed by the client for targeted data searching workflows.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.StudentCtl
Populates the StudentBean context data transfer object instance using transformed values harvested from user request parameters.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.StudentListCtl
Populates the StudentBean object with filtering parameters sent by the user from the student list view search criteria fields.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.TimetableCtl
Extracts parameters from request contexts to populate an integrated instance of TimetableBean.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.TimetableListCtl
Populates the TimetableBean object with specific search constraints such as selected courseId, subjectId, and examDate parameters from the list search view.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.UserCtl
Populates the UserBean data container object using parsed input properties collected from the transaction request context.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.UserListCtl
Populates the UserBean object with specific criteria properties extracted from the request context for targeted query filtering workflows.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.UserRegistrationCtl
Extracts structural request parameters to assemble a transaction-ready UserBean object instance, forcing default Student authorization privileges.
populateDTO(BaseBean, HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.BaseCtl
Populates common DTO fields such as createdBy, modifiedBy, createdDatetime, and modifiedDatetime.
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.BaseCtl
Preloads data such as dropdown lists.
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.CollegeListCtl
Preloads college data into request scope.
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.CourseListCtl
Preloads the initial data required for the view component, such as loading the complete list of courses for dropdown filters.
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.FacultyCtl
Preloads lists of Colleges, Subjects, and Courses from the database and loads them into the request scope to populate dropdown menus in the view.
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.MarksheetCtl
Preloads initial data required for the presentation view, such as fetching the list of available students to populate dropdown menus.
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.StudentCtl
Preloads contextual dependencies needed by presentation layers, such as retrieving the master college directory list to populate input select options.
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.TimetableCtl
Preloads crucial underlying relational datasets such as Subject and Course lookups to properly populate presentation layer selection forms.
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.TimetableListCtl
Preloads crucial filter dropdown data dependencies, pulling the complete list of Subjects and Courses into request attributes for view-level searching filters.
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.UserCtl
Preloads crucial backend context parameters, such as fetching the complete security role master collection to populate presentation dropdown filters.
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.UserListCtl
Preloads contextual dependencies, retrieving the complete security role master list to populate dynamic dropdown filters within the user tracking view.
PropertyReader - Class in in.co.rays.proj4.util
Utility class to read and manage application properties and localized messages from the system configuration resource bundles.
PropertyReader() - Constructor for class in.co.rays.proj4.util.PropertyReader
 
props - Static variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.EmailUtility
Runtime system parameters mapping standard structural environment variables to JavaMail properties.
